error_signature: workflow executes multiple times after wait node
title: Workflow executes multiple times unexpectedly
symptom: The workflow runs multiple times after the wait node, leading to repeated calls to leads. This results in leads being contacted multiple times in quick succession.
not_this_if: Workflow is designed to run only once per trigger
root_cause: The workflow is likely set to execute multiple times due to the configuration of the nodes following the wait node. If the last node is not set to execute only once, it can lead to multiple executions for each trigger.
fix_steps: Open the last node of your workflow
agent_instruction: Set the last node to 'Execute Once' to prevent multiple executions.
